summary: DHH praises Noah Grey, creator of the Greymatter weblog script that powers his blog, for his photography work on the Depth Of Field gallery. He expresses admiration for Grey's dual talents as both a developer and photographer. DHH mentions 'registering' Greymatter by purchasing an item from Grey's Amazon wishlist as a form of voluntary payment for the free software.
key_points: Noah Grey created Greymatter, the weblog script DHH used for his early blog
DHH admired Grey's photography on his Depth Of Field personal gallery
DHH supported the free software by buying from Grey's Amazon wishlist as a voluntary registration
money_quotes: Noah Grey is truely gifted. Not only has he developed the great weblog script powering this blog, but he's also an very accomplish photographer.
key_insight: An early glimpse of DHH's engagement with the indie web and open-source software community, showing his appreciation for creators who build tools and share them freely.
